## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX teams to discuss ongoing projects and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO content creation (1-2/week) and integration pages (30/week) progressing well; trending upward](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Integration use case guides: 2 new docs ready for review; discussing optimal placement (main site vs. dev site)](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Code components project to be scoped and prioritized](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [SEO content creation to pause after current batch to evaluate performance](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)

## Topics

### SEO Content and Integration Pages Progress

  - [1-2 SEO content pieces/week; updating in Airtap](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Integration pages: 30/week, currently at 183, will be 213 by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Results trending upward; tracking ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Data asks for Amplitude exports (for Colin)](https://fathom.video/share/9PjaA9eMSyYuXersZevXDvcoXuuG3u_H?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Integration Page Submissions
